history.content: Implemented exactly as proposed. ### Changed files 1. `src/gateway/tools/defs/file-web-memory.ts` - Added src-edit tool definitions for: - `insert_after_source(file, after_line, content)` - `delete_lines_source(file, start_line, end_line)` - `write_source(file, content, overwrite?)` - Kept existing `find_replace_source` and `replace_lines_source` unchanged. 2. `src/gateway/routes/proposals.router.ts` - Updated `srcToolBlock` to include: - `write_source(file, content, overwrite?)` - Replaced step-2 guidance from replace-biased wording to operation-based guidance: - `find_replace_source` for exact text swaps - `replace_lines_source` for line-range replacement - `insert_after_source` for insertion - `delete_lines_source` for deletion - `write_source` for new src files / explicit overwrite 3.
